user.title: Tadiran AC
user.description: Enter the phone number registered with your My Tadiran account. You'll receive an SMS code in the next step.

otp.title: Verify SMS code
otp.description: Enter the verification code sent to {phone}.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Tadiran
reauth_confirm.description: Your session expired. A new SMS code will be sent to {phone}. Continue?

error.invalid_phone: Phone number must start with + and the country code.

abort.already_configured: This phone number is already configured.
